Custom Proposal Banners for Wedding & Special Event Display

Durable Vinyl Material for Customizable Proposal Banner Orders

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Upload Your Design or Let Our Team Create Your Proposal Banner Choose Your Proposal Banner Size and Specifications Add Custom Text and Graphics for Your Special Moment PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Proposal Banners for Indoor & Outdoor Displays

Make your proposal unforgettable with a custom vinyl proposal banner designed for your special moment. Our proposal banners are perfect for indoor venues, outdoor settings, and surprise displays that will create lasting memories.

Each proposal banner is printed on high-quality vinyl material using state-of-the-art large-format printers for vibrant colors and sharp text that ensures your message stands out. Whether you're planning a beach proposal, park display, or indoor surprise, our durable vinyl construction withstands various weather conditions.

Available in sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', our proposal banners can be customized with your personal message, photos, and design elements. Choose from hemmed edges with grommets for easy hanging, or select pole pockets for professional banner display systems.

All proposal banners are manufactured and printed in the USA with strict quality checks by our experienced design team. If your artwork needs adjustments for optimal printing, our in-house graphic designers will contact you to ensure perfect results.

Key Features:

  • Durable 13oz vinyl material for indoor and outdoor use
  • Vibrant, fade-resistant printing technology
  • Custom sizes up to 8' x 50'
  • Multiple finishing options for professional installation
  • Fast turnaround times available
  • 100% satisfaction guarantee
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Proposal Banner Material for Indoor & Outdoor Installation

Our proposal banners are printed on premium 13oz scrim vinyl, specifically chosen for its durability and professional appearance in both indoor and outdoor wedding environments.

13oz Scrim Vinyl Specifications:

  • Weather-resistant material suitable for outdoor proposals
  • Smooth surface for vibrant color reproduction
  • Tear-resistant construction for reliable display
  • UV-resistant inks prevent fading in sunlight
  • Flexible material for easy transport and setup

Material Performance:

  • Temperature range: -20°F to 160°F
  • Wind resistance with proper installation
  • Waterproof surface for outdoor use
  • Easy to clean with mild soap and water
  • Recommended display duration: 2-3 years outdoors

Please note that vinyl is temperature-sensitive, and size variance up to 1/2 inch per linear foot may occur due to printing and environmental factors. For precision sizing requirements, contact our team for specialized handling.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Proposal Banner Finishing Options for Professional Display

Choose the finishing option that best suits your proposal setup and installation requirements:

Hemmed Edges with Grommets (Recommended):

  • Double-folded and heat-sealed 1" hem on all sides
  • Rust-resistant aluminum grommets every 2 feet
  • Perfect for rope, bungee cord, or zip tie installation
  • Most versatile option for various display methods

Pole Pockets:

  • Available on top, bottom, or both sides
  • 2" or 3" pocket sizes to fit standard poles
  • Clean, professional appearance without visible hardware
  • Ideal for banner stands or pole mounting systems

Wind Slits:

  • Strategic cuts to reduce wind resistance
  • Recommended for banners over 20 square feet
  • Helps prevent tearing in windy conditions
  • Available on request for outdoor proposals

Reinforced Corners:

  • Additional vinyl welded at stress points
  • Extra durability for long-term display
  • Prevents corner tearing under tension
PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Proposal Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We understand that proposal timing is crucial. Choose from multiple production speeds to ensure your banner arrives exactly when you need it:

Standard Production (5-7 Business Days):

  • Most economical option
  • Includes design review and quality check
  • Perfect for advance planning
  • Ships via ground transportation

Express Production (3-4 Business Days):

  • Priority processing in our print queue
  • Expedited design approval process
  • Ideal for last-minute planning
  • Ships via expedited ground service

Rush Production (1-2 Business Days):

  • Fastest available production time
  • Same-day design review when possible
  • Perfect for urgent proposals
  • Ships via overnight or 2-day air

Production Timeline Notes:

  • Production begins after artwork approval
  • Complex designs may require additional review time
  • Large format banners (over 100 sq ft) may need extra production time
  • Holiday and weekend schedules may affect timing

For specific delivery date requirements, contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Proposal Banner Payment & Ordering Options

We accept multiple payment methods to make your proposal banner order convenient and secure:

Credit Cards Accepted:

  • Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover
  • Secure SSL encryption for all transactions
  • Immediate order processing upon approval
  • Save payment methods for future orders

Business Payment Options:

  • Net terms available for established accounts
  • Purchase orders accepted from qualifying organizations
  • Volume pricing for multiple banner orders
  • Tax exemption certificates accepted

Alternative Payment Methods:

  • PayPal and PayPal Credit
  • Bank wire transfers for large orders
  • Check or money order (production begins after clearance)

Pricing Information:

  • Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
  • Quantity discounts available
  • Rush production fees apply for expedited orders
  • Shipping costs calculated at checkout

All orders include our satisfaction guarantee. If you're not completely happy with your proposal banner, we'll work with you to make it right.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Proposal Banner Delivery

We offer flexible shipping options to ensure your proposal banner arrives safely and on time for your special moment:

Standard Shipping Options:

  • Ground shipping (5-7 business days)
  • Expedited ground (3-4 business days)
  • 2-day air express
  • Next-day air for urgent deliveries

Packaging & Protection:

  • Banners up to 8 feet folded in protective packaging
  • Larger banners may require freight shipping
  • Weather-resistant shipping materials
  • Tracking information provided for all shipments

Delivery Considerations:

  • Residential and commercial delivery available
  • Signature confirmation optional
  • Hold for pickup at shipping centers
  • International shipping available to most countries

Important Shipping Notes:

  • Banners exceeding 8 feet in both directions will be folded
  • Contact us for rolled shipping options (freight charges apply)
  • Weather delays may affect delivery times
  • PO Box delivery available for smaller banners

Shipping Damage:

Inspect your banner immediately upon delivery. Report any shipping damage within 24 hours for fastest replacement processing.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Wedding & Event Uses for Custom Proposal Banners

Proposal banners create unforgettable moments for engagements and special occasions. Here are popular ways customers use their custom proposal banners:

Outdoor Proposal Locations:

  • Beach and waterfront proposals
  • Park and garden displays
  • Sports stadium and arena surprises
  • Mountain and scenic overlook installations
  • Backyard and private property setups

Indoor Proposal Venues:

  • Restaurant and hotel displays
  • Home decoration for intimate proposals
  • Wedding venue announcements
  • Shopping center and mall installations
  • Corporate office surprises

Special Event Applications:

  • Engagement party announcements
  • Wedding reception displays
  • Anniversary celebration backdrops
  • Family gathering announcements
  • Social media photo opportunities

Installation Methods:

  • Fence and railing mounting
  • Tree and post installation
  • Building wall attachment
  • Portable banner stand display
  • Ground stake and frame systems

Popular Design Elements:

  • "Will You Marry Me?" text in elegant fonts
  • Romantic photos and image collages
  • Heart graphics and decorative borders
  • Couple names and special dates
  • Coordinated wedding colors and themes
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Proposal Banner Printing

Ensure your proposal banner prints perfectly with these artwork guidelines and specifications:

File Format Requirements:

  • PDF (preferred), AI, EPS, or PSD files
  • High-resolution JPEG or PNG (300 DPI minimum)
  • Vector formats recommended for text and logos
  • CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction

Resolution & Size Guidelines:

  • Large format printing: 100-150 DPI at final size
  • Vector artwork scales without quality loss
  • Raster images should be sized appropriately
  • Avoid low-resolution web images (72 DPI)

Design Layout Requirements:

  • Include 2" bleed area around design edges
  • Keep important text 3" from banner edges
  • Consider viewing distance when sizing text
  • Use high contrast for maximum readability

Color Specifications:

  • CMYK color profile for print accuracy
  • Pantone colors can be converted to CMYK
  • Rich blacks use C:40 M:40 Y:40 K:100
  • Avoid pure white for outdoor banners (use light gray)

Text & Font Guidelines:

  • Minimum text size: 2" for distance viewing
  • Outline all fonts or include font files
  • Sans-serif fonts recommended for clarity
  • Bold weights improve readability

Design Services Available:

Don't have artwork? Our experienced design team can create your proposal banner from your ideas, photos, and text. Design services include unlimited revisions until you're completely satisfied.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Proposal Banner Questions & Answers

What size proposal banner should I order?

Banner size depends on your location and viewing distance. For intimate proposals, 2'x4' to 3'x6' works well. For public displays or distant viewing, consider 4'x8' or larger. Our team can recommend the ideal size based on your specific proposal plans.

How long will my proposal banner last outdoors?

Our vinyl proposal banners are designed for 2-3 years of outdoor use with proper care. For short-term proposal displays (days or weeks), they'll maintain perfect appearance. UV-resistant inks prevent fading in sunlight.

Can I get my proposal banner delivered overnight?

Yes! We offer rush production (1-2 business days) combined with overnight shipping for urgent proposals. Contact us by phone for same-day artwork approval when possible.

What if I need help with my proposal banner design?

Our experienced design team specializes in proposal banners and can create your design from scratch. Simply provide your text, any photos, and basic preferences - we'll handle the rest with unlimited revisions.

Will my proposal banner work in windy conditions?

Yes, with proper installation. Choose hemmed edges with grommets for secure mounting, and consider wind slits for banners over 20 square feet. Our team can recommend the best installation method for your location.

Can I include photos in my proposal banner design?

Absolutely! Photos add a personal touch to proposal banners. Provide high-resolution images (300 DPI minimum), and our team will optimize them for large-format printing to ensure they look perfect on your banner.

What colors work best for outdoor proposal banners?

High contrast combinations work best for visibility. Classic choices include white or light text on dark backgrounds, or dark text on light backgrounds. Our design team can recommend colors based on your proposal location and lighting conditions.

Do you offer a money-back guarantee?

Yes! We guarantee your satisfaction with every proposal banner. If you're not completely happy with the final product, we'll work with you to make it right or provide a full refund.
